exact_oracle_rule: An oracle counts only for the exact WRF module/routine it drives. Family-similar or wrapper-adjacent oracles do not validate a different mp_physics option.

5.scheme: Ferrier-HRW / new Eta operational High-Resolution Window
5.remaining: Operational GPU kernel/state wiring remains future work; the v0.18 endpoint is exact FER_HIRES-oracle-backed reference/fail-closed. The MP95 ETAMP_NEW oracle is not reused for MP5.
